description: The 'TechGadgets Shop' website report is cluttered with unique URLs due to tracking parameters and fragments. Your task is to clean up the data collection configuration. Log in to Matomo (admin / Admin12345) and modify the 'TechGadgets Shop' website settings to exclude the query parameters 'fbclid', 'gclid', and 'session_id' from tracking. Additionally, disable the tracking of URL fragments (anchors). Do not modify the 'Initial Site'.
